positioning.headline: The Performance Coach behind high-achieving men.

bio.name: Mukund Venkat
bio.background_arc: Indian-born → studied in London → ran gyms in Chennai → returned to London → competition stage to client transformation

method_pillars.title: Data, not guesswork
method_pillars.body: Bloodwork, biomarkers, and structured assessments — overseen by clinical partner Dr Neel Reddy — set the baseline. We treat the body like a system, not a hunch.

method_pillars.title: Stage-ready discipline
method_pillars.body: Methods proven on the international physique stage — applied to busy professionals. Restraint over volume. Precision over noise.

method_pillars.title: Strength as the foundation
method_pillars.body: Lean physique, athletic performance, and longevity all start with structural strength. We build the body that lets you do everything else better.

method_pillars.title: Coaching, not cheerleading
method_pillars.body: You're already driven. You don't need motivation. You need a system, structured accountability, and someone who has done it himself — at the highest level.

offer_ladder.name: The Performance Audit
offer_ladder.description: A diagnostic of your current state — physical, structural, and behavioural. You leave with a 14-day action plan, even if we never work together again.
offer_ladder.best_for: Anyone who wants the system without committing yet

offer_ladder.name: Online Transformation
offer_ladder.description: The signature programme. Custom training, nutrition, and weekly check-ins. Globally accessible. The most chosen tier — and the one most clients renew.
offer_ladder.best_for: Travel-heavy professionals, global clients, or anyone training in their own gym

offer_ladder.name: Hybrid Signature
offer_ladder.description: Online programme plus monthly in-person session in London. The 'best of both worlds' tier for high-accountability London-based professionals.
offer_ladder.best_for: London-based execs who need structure plus periodic in-person calibration

offer_ladder.name: Full In-Person Transformation
offer_ladder.description: 2-3 in-person sessions per week, full programming, nutrition, recovery oversight. The most intensive tier — a full body and lifestyle rebuild.
offer_ladder.best_for: London residents wanting the highest-touch experience

image_strategy_decision.decision: Use existing 17 curated images with editorial CSS treatments. NO face regeneration.
rationale: Face drift risk is too high for a personal brand — even careful AI regen can subtly alter identity
Authentic photographs carry premium credibility for personal brand sites
Framing issues solvable via object-position, aspect-ratio, mask gradients, duotone overlays
5 hero candidates already score 8/10 — strong working set
The 1 discard candidate (mukund_coaching_client_2) gets dropped, not regenerated
Future shoot day: replace audit-flagged images with intentional studio shoot rather than AI regen
css_treatments_to_use: object-position: center top/bottom for tight crops
Subtle grain texture overlay for editorial feel
Linear-gradient bottom-fade so cropped subjects merge with section backgrounds
Aspect-ratio fixing via container — never stretch images
Ken burns + parallax animations for cinematic motion
